utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7. Each one is fully detailed: destination (Athens, Greece) is specified; travel_dates (2024-10-15 to 2024-10-19) are given; transportation includes flight details with cost; accommodation includes hotel name, type, nights, location, cost, and amenities; activities list multiple items with costs; additional_services include restaurants with costs; total_budget provides a detailed cost breakdown. All are fully specified according to the required details.
